start.title: Set up your lawn
start.subtitle: Tell us about your lawn so we can estimate soil conditions accurately.

errors.invalid_latitude: Invalid latitude. Must be between -90 and 90.
errors.invalid_longitude: Invalid longitude. Must be between -180 and 180.
errors.no_location: No location set. Please configure latitude and longitude in device settings.
errors.fetch_failed: Failed to fetch weather data. Will retry on next poll.

scoring.early_growth: Early growth – lawn is waking up

water.target_reached: No watering needed — rainfall target reached
water.rain_covers_deficit: No watering needed — enough rain expected this week
water.below_minimum: Water deficit {{amount}} mm — below minimum actionable amount
water.heat_stress: Watering recommended: {{amount}} mm — heat stress, water lightly and repeat
water.recommended: Watering recommended: {{amount}} mm needed this week

fertiliser.no_date: Set last fertiliser date to enable scheduling.
fertiliser.soil_too_cold_overdue: Due, but delayed — soil temperature below {{minTemp}} °C
fertiliser.low_growth_overdue: Due, but delayed — lawn not growing actively enough
fertiliser.low_growth: Too early — lawn not growing actively enough
fertiliser.warm_season_cool_overdue: Due, but delayed — soil too cool for warm-season grass
fertiliser.warm_season_cool: Waiting — soil too cool for warm-season grass
fertiliser.heavy_rain_overdue: Due, but delayed — heavy rain expected
fertiliser.due_light_rain: Due now — light rain expected, ideal timing
fertiliser.due_no_rain: Due now — no rain expected, water after applying

mowing.not_suitable: Growth conditions not suitable for mowing

dashboard.heat_recommendation: Water lightly to cool the root zone
dashboard.water_recommendation: Apply {{amount}} mm on next watering day
dashboard.water_reason: Water deficit: {{amount}} mm remaining this week
dashboard.fertiliser_recommendation: Apply fertiliser now — conditions are good
dashboard.mow_reason: Growth conditions are good for mowing
dashboard.recovery_recommendation: Lawn is recovering — avoid heavy disturbance
dashboard.recovery_reason: Low growth score — grass is recovering

reasons.heat_stress: Increase mowing height during heat stress
reasons.drought: Delay mowing to improve drought resistance
reasons.spring: Lower mowing height gradually for spring growth
reasons.shade: Maintain higher grass height for shade

recs.frost_protection: Frost protection mode — avoid mowing. Raise mower to {{height}} mm.
recs.heat_stress_raise: Heat stress detected — raise mowing height to {{height}} mm.
recs.drought_active: Drought protection mode active — reduce mowing frequency.
recs.drought_risk: Drought risk — delay mowing to improve drought resistance.
recs.spring_growth: Spring growth accelerating — lower mowing height gradually to {{height}} mm.
recs.increase_frequency: Increase mowing frequency to every {{days}} days.
recs.premium_growth: Premium growth mode active — maintain mowing height at {{height}} mm.
recs.drought_resistant_mode: Drought resistant mode active — mow every {{days}} days at {{height}} mm.
recs.low_maintenance_mode: Low maintenance mode — mow every {{days}} days.
recs.slow_growth: Reduce mowing frequency due to slow growth — next mow in {{days}} days.

notifications.heat_stress: Heat stress detected — raise mowing height to {{height}} mm.
notifications.drought_protection: Drought protection mode active. Raise mowing height to {{height}} mm.
notifications.frost_protection: Frost risk — avoid mowing. Mower height set to {{height}} mm.
notifications.spring_growth: Spring growth accelerating — lower mowing height gradually to {{height}} mm.

notifications.fertiliser_due: Your lawn is ready for fertiliser. Soil temperature and growth conditions look good.
notifications.fertiliser_heavy_rain: Fertiliser is due, but heavy rain is expected. Consider waiting a few days.
notifications.fertiliser_upcoming_one: Fertiliser window is coming up in 1 day.
notifications.fertiliser_upcoming: Fertiliser window is coming up in {{days}} days.
notifications.water_needed: Your lawn needs water: {{amount}} mm remaining this week.
notifications.water_rain_delay: Watering delayed — rain expected within 24 hours.
notifications.water_target_reached: Weekly water target reached. No watering needed.
